violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed freezer in Walk in cooler needs to be defrosted.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of microwave needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of appliances need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor of walk in cooler needs to be cleaned.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
